name: The Bunker at Bellevue
about: The Bunker at Bellevue is a dual-venue golf facility in Atchison, Kansas, offering both an outdoor 18-hole championship course and an indoor golf simulator center. The outdoor course is a public, Par 71 layout established in 1923, featuring mature trees, elevation changes, and three sets of tees. The indoor facility utilizes TrackMan simulator technology for year-round play, practice, and leagues. The venue emphasizes accessibility, offering memberships without requiring them, and provides a full bar and grill service for both outdoor and indoor patrons.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round play enabled by indoor TrackMan simulators
Scenic and challenging outdoor course with multiple tee boxes
Full food and drink service available for both on-course and simulator play
Active leagues and events program for all skill levels
Public course welcoming both members and non-members

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available for ordering before or during play, served at the indoor simulator facility.
Bar & grill with drinks available for indoor and outdoor patrons.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading golf simulators with precise ball and swing analysis.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether they provide club rentals. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and grill on-site, serving food and drinks. It is not specified if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator round. Contact the venue for more details on typical play times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Bunker at Bellevue appears to be kid-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere and services suitable for families.
